flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at La Sierra University rose 46% between 2007 and 2010 ($6.6k → $9.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at La Sierra University vs the 2004–2008 baseline (1.2k vs 1.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at La Sierra University rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 ($21.8k → $25.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at La Sierra University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.2k → $37.7k).
